testcase.name: adminLoginTest
testcase.system-out:
DB -> Email: spare@admin.com, Password: @12345678 Using admin credentials -> Email: spare@admin.com, Password: @12345678 Request method: POST Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "@12345678", "email": "spare@admin.com" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 512 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Tue, 07 Apr 2026 06:56:28 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "Login successful", "data": { "user": { "id": "07a9d666-9f14-49b9-92fb-6b0dab9900b6", "firstName": "John", "lastName": "smith", "email": "spare@admin.com", "role": "admin", "groupId": "5328c91e-fc40-11f0-8e00-5000e6331276", "groupName": "1st Group 2026", "approvalStatus": "approved", "createdAt": "2026-03-16 16:15:58", "updatedAt": "2026-04-07 08:53:26" }, "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiIwN2E5ZDY2Ni05ZjE0LTQ5YjktOTJmYi02YjBkYWI5OTAwYjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InNwYXJlQGFkbWluLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTU0NDk4OCwiZXhwIjoxNzc1NjMxMzg4fQ.fINtil-2Wyo_97hRUEpZmpKk5pLaKGdnHpLiQLhbtWw" } }
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: userRegistration
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/register Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstName": "Register", "lastName": "Jsonapi", "password": "@87654321", "groupId": "5328c91e-fc40-11f0-8e00-5000e6331276", "confirmPassword": "@87654321", "email": "lesley.watsica@yahoo.com" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 304 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Tue, 07 Apr 2026 06:56:30 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "Registration submitted successfully. Your account is pending admin approval.", "data": { "id": "f40493df-6aa5-4df0-b425-1368f314ffe9", "firstName": "Register", "lastName": "Jsonapi", "email": "lesley.watsica@yahoo.com", "groupId": "5328c91e-fc40-11f0-8e00-5000e6331276", "groupName": "1st Group 2026", "approvalStatus": "pending", "createdAt": "2026-04-07T08:56:30.000Z" } }

testcase.name: approveUserRegistration
testcase.system-out:
Request method: PUT Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/admin/users/f40493df-6aa5-4df0-b425-1368f314ffe9/approve Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiIwN2E5ZDY2Ni05ZjE0LTQ5YjktOTJmYi02YjBkYWI5OTAwYjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InNwYXJlQGFkbWluLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTU0NDk4OCwiZXhwIjoxNzc1NjMxMzg4fQ.fINtil-2Wyo_97hRUEpZmpKk5pLaKGdnHpLiQLhbtWw Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 200 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Tue, 07 Apr 2026 06:56:30 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "User approved successfully", "data": { "id": "f40493df-6aa5-4df0-b425-1368f314ffe9", "firstName": "Register", "lastName": "Jsonapi", "email": "lesley.watsica@yahoo.com", "approvalStatus": "approved" } }

testcase.name: userLoginTest
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "@87654321", "email": "lesley.watsica@yahoo.com" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 519 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Tue, 07 Apr 2026 06:56:31 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "Login successful", "data": { "user": { "id": "f40493df-6aa5-4df0-b425-1368f314ffe9", "firstName": "Register", "lastName": "Jsonapi", "email": "lesley.watsica@yahoo.com", "role": "user", "groupId": "5328c91e-fc40-11f0-8e00-5000e6331276", "groupName": "1st Group 2026", "approvalStatus": "approved", "createdAt": "2026-04-07 08:56:30", "updatedAt": "2026-04-07 08:56:30" }, "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiJmNDA0OTNkZi02YWE1LTRkZjAtYjQyNS0xMzY4ZjMxNGZmZTkiLCJlbWFpbCI6Imxlc2xleS53YXRzaWNhQHlhaG9vLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJ1c2VyIiwiaWF0IjoxNzc1NTQ0OTkxLCJleHAiOjE3NzU2MzEzOTF9.Fe3aY5CdpG6JI_-5NPF_m29PRTsGgFNH60N8Yi0e5IY" } }
